subcodes.first_line: O esteemed and wise one, my partner and companion, and in servitude at the Sacred Threshold, my comrade and confidant, the ascension [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حضرت حکیم شریک و سهیم من و در عبودیت آستان مقدس قرین و صدیق من صعود حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @wisdom [hikmat]
